pull_request.title: fix: update requires-python to support Python 3.14
pull_request.body: ## Summary - Updated `requires-python` from `>=3.10,<3.14` to `>=3.10,<3.15` in four packages: elevenlabs-moss, pipecat-moss, strands-agents-moss, vapi-moss - The publish workflows test against Python 3.10-3.14, but the `<3.14` upper bound caused pip to reject wheel installation during the 3.14 smoke test ## Note The moss-md-indexer and vitepress-plugin-moss publish failures are caused by a missing `NPM_PUBLISH_TOKEN` repo secret -- not a code issue. ## Test plan - [ ] Re-run publish workflows for elevenlabs-moss, vapi-moss, strands-agents-moss to verify 3.14 matrix passes - [ ] Set `NPM_PUBLISH_TOKEN` secret and re-run moss-md-indexer / vitepress-plugin-moss workflows ---

changed_files.patch:
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ name = "elevenlabs-moss"
 version = "0.0.1"
 description = "Moss semantic search integration for ElevenLabs Conversational AI"
 readme = "README.md"
-requires-python = ">=3.10,<3.14"
+requires-python = ">=3.10,<3.15"
 dependencies = [
     "moss>=1.0.0",
     "elevenlabs>=2.40.0",

@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ name = "pipecat-moss"
 version = "0.0.3"
 description = "Moss vector search integration for Pipecat"
 readme = "README.md"
-requires-python = ">=3.10,<3.14"
+requires-python = ">=3.10,<3.15"
 dependencies = [
     "moss>=1.0.0",
     "loguru>=0.7.0",

@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ name = "strands-agents-moss"
 version = "0.0.1"
 description = "Moss semantic search integration for Strands Agents"
 readme = "README.md"
-requires-python = ">=3.10,<3.14"
+requires-python = ">=3.10,<3.15"
 dependencies = [
     "moss>=1.0.0",
     "strands-agents>=0.1.0",

@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ name = "vapi-moss"
 version = "0.0.1"
 description = "Moss semantic search integration for VAPI Custom Knowledge Base webhooks"
 readme = "README.md"
-requires-python = ">=3.10,<3.14"
+requires-python = ">=3.10,<3.15"
 dependencies = [
     "moss>=1.0.0",
 ]

commit_summaries.message:
fix: update requires-python to support Python 3.14

The publish workflows test against Python 3.10-3.14, but four packages
had requires-python = ">=3.10,<3.14" which caused the 3.14 smoke test
to fail with "requires a different Python" during pip install.
fix: update crewai cookbook requires-python to support 3.14

Revert "fix: update crewai cookbook requires-python to support 3.14"

This reverts commit 989464be339e3287845137e4526f98a8e60de767.
